changeSet.author: Ibrahima G. Coulibaly
changeSet.sql: UPDATE "own_user" u SET role_id = sub.min_role_id FROM ( -- Identify the 'primary' ID for each default role code SELECT id as bad_role_id, MIN(id) OVER (PARTITION BY code) as min_role_id FROM role WHERE company_settings_id IS NULL AND code !=6 ) sub WHERE u.role_id = sub.bad_role_id AND sub.bad_role_id != sub.min_role_id; DELETE FROM role WHERE company_settings_id IS NULL AND code !=6 AND id NOT IN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM role WHERE company_settings_id IS NULL GROUP BY code);
